title: Endless Void
description: Ads more content to the end dimension
body:
This mod focus on adding more end themed blocks (ONLY IN CREATIVE MODE AT THE MOMENT).

IMPORTANT NOTES:
"this mod purpose will expand to be funtionable /(most of the blocks and items will be obtainable) in suvival mode as well when the end generation is changed in FUTURE COMPLETE VERTIONS" "Looking for people with moding experience to make development easier (send mesage through the "mod recruitment" channel". Any questions, problems or sugestions write them on the corresponding channel of the mods discussions category on the discord server.

The blocks that this mod adds are:

Chiseled End Stone
Tiled Chiseled End Stone
